outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump threatens 'a whole civilization will die tonight' — then agrees to 2-week ceasefire
outlets.summary: Coverage of Trump's escalatory rhetoric followed by surprise ceasefire agreement mediated by Pakistan.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: US and Israel strike Iran's oil, rail and bridges ahead of Trump deadline
outlets.summary: Comprehensive reporting on Day 39 military operations and the diplomatic whiplash from threat to ceasefire.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Vance says Iran has '2 pathways' as deadline looms; Trump agrees to 2-week pause
outlets.summary: Coverage of Vance's Budapest remarks and Trump's ceasefire decision. Framed as 'peace through strength.'

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Russia, China veto UN resolution aimed at reopening Strait of Hormuz hours before Trump deadline
outlets.summary: Emphasis on Russia-China obstruction and justification for unilateral US action.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: Trump says US to suspend 'bombing, attack' for two weeks
outlets.summary: Live coverage of Day 39 from threats to ceasefire. Focus on humanitarian impact and cluster munition use.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Trump offers two-week ceasefire after threatening to destroy Iran
outlets.summary: Analysis of the diplomatic reversal and Pakistan's mediation role.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Iran fires ballistic missile salvos at central, southern Israel on last day of Passover
outlets.summary: Live coverage of 6 BM salvos with cluster munitions hitting Israeli population centers.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Netanyahu confirms strikes on bridges, railways across Iran to thwart IRGC
outlets.summary: IDF infrastructure campaign targeting transportation networks used by IRGC.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: IRGC launches Wave 99 of Operation True Promise IV against US-Israeli positions
outlets.summary: Coverage of IRGC retaliatory strikes against US bases in Kuwait and Saudi Arabia.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Government spokesperson: Trump's civilization threat 'a sign of ignorance'
outlets.summary: Iranian government response to Trump's threats and framing of conflict as defense of Islamic civilization.
